student_input: I got 1010/1100 in Matric, 970/1100 in FSc and 185 in MDCAT. I want to apply to King Edward Medical University.

state.student_input: I got 1010/1100 in Matric, 970/1100 in FSc and 185 in MDCAT. I want to apply to King Edward Medical University.
state.advice: Congratulations, you have met the eligibility criteria and your calculated merit score of 90.7% is highly competitive. With a strong foundation in matric and FSC, and a notable performance in the MDCAT, you have a promising profile for admission to King Edward Medical University. Your dedication to academics is evident, and with this merit score, you should be confident in your application. Keep in mind that the final decision will depend on various factors, including the pool of applicants, but your current standing is certainly favorable. Stay positive and look forward to the next steps in the admission process.
